title: Divoom Spark-Pro Bluetooth Portable Speaker Karaoke Speaker
description:
Brand: Divoom
Dimension: 159.2×95.1×277.5mm
Weight: 1700g
Speaker size: 93Bass Driver 2×31 Tweeter
Output: 80W
Frequency response: 60Hz-20KHz
Range: ≥10m
Signal-to-noise ratio: 82dB
Play time: 8hrs (depends on volume/audio types)
Battery: 54Wh
Charging time: 5h
Charging input: 5V/
3A
Bluetooth version: 5.2 Microphone Specs
Dimension: 40x40x150.4mm
Weight: 317.8gg(Microphonex2) 134.3g(Charging dock)
Frequency response: 50Hz-16KHz
Battery: 4.44Wh
UHF Bandwidth: 470-960Mhz (depends on country/area)
Transmitter Frequency: <10mW
Sensitivity: -50(+3)dB
Charge time: 3hrs
Charge input: 5V/
2A (microphonex2)
Play time: ≥10h
Range: ≥7m
Features
:
Powerful 80-Watt Sound
:
The Divoom Spark-Pro boasts an 80-watt speaker, delivering crisp and clear sound that fills the room. Whether you're playing music or singing your favorite tunes, the powerful audio ensures an immersive experience, perfect for parties, karaoke nights, or casual listening.
Dual Wireless Microphones
:
Included with the Spark-Pro are two wireless microphones, making it easy for you and a friend to sing duets or engage in lively group performances. The wireless design allows for freedom of movement, enhancing the overall karaoke experience without the hassle of tangled cords.
Versatile Voice Filters
:
The Spark-Pro offers six distinct voice filters-Pop, Studio, Host, Singer, Robot, and Baby-that allow you to customize and experiment with your vocal sound. These filters add a fun, creative element to your karaoke sessions, letting you tailor your performance to your liking.
Multiple Connectivity Options
:
With TF Card Input, Aux Input, USB-C Input, and Bluetooth Mode, the Spark-Pro provides a variety of ways to connect and play your music. Whether you're streaming from a phone, using a laptop, or plugging in an auxiliary device, this speaker accommodates all your audio needs.
Lightweight and Portable Design
:
Weighing just 4 pounds, the Spark-Pro is designed for portability. It comes with a handy carrying strap, making it easy to take with you wherever you go. Despite its compact size, the speaker delivers up to 8 hours of playtime on a full charge, ensuring your music can keep going as long as you do.
Package Included:
Spark-Pro x 1, Spark-Pro-Mic x 2, Mic Charging Station x 1, Type-C Cable x 1, AUX Cable x 1, User manual x 1, Hand suitcase x 1, carry bag x 1
Specifications
Warranty
2-Year Warranty

- Multiple Connection Modes: Supports Bluetooth mode, audio cable connection, and TF card playback to meet your various needs.
- Cool LED Surround Lighting Effects: Six cool lighting effects, single-click for breathing flash, double-click for single color switch, and long press to turn LED on/off,     creating a vibrant visual experience.
- 1800mAh Large Capacity Battery: Equipped with a large capacity lithium battery, offering long-lasting playback, with approximately 3 hours of music on a single charge.
- 360° Full Frequency Sound / Balanced Tri-band: New ultra-wide frequency unit providing 360° full-frequency sound, delivering powerful bass and clear highs.
- Next-gen Bluetooth 5.4 Chip / Stable Transmission: The latest Bluetooth chip ensures no delay in videos and games, providing a smooth experience.

title: Transformers TF-Y15 Magnetic Bluetooth Mini Speaker
description:
Brand: Transformers
Model: TF-Y15
Bluetooth Version: V5.4
Battery capacity: 300mAh
Playing time: about7.5 hours (at 50% volume)
Charging time: 1~1.5 hours
Transmission range: up to 10 meters
Features:
- Magnetic Design for Versatile Attachment:
Easily attaches to any metal surface, ensuring stability and convenience. Perfect for various scenarios such as phone attachment, outdoor camping, indoor use on a fridge, or carrying while biking.
- 360° Surround Sound:
Delivers immersive 360° panoramic sound with high-quality audio and detailed, three-dimensional sound effects. Balanced tuning across high, mid, and low frequencies provides an exceptional listening experience.
- Bluetooth 5.4 Technology:
Features the latest Bluetooth 5.4 chip for lower power consumption, more stable connections, and nearly lossless audio transmission, ensuring high-quality sound.
- High-Sensitivity Microphone:
Enables clear, hands-free calls with a one-touch connection to your phone. The microphone ensures voice clarity, making conversations feel face-to-face.
- Type-C Fast Charging and Long Battery Life:
Equipped with a Type-C port for quick and convenient charging. The speaker offers extended battery life with low-power Bluetooth transmission, providing uninterrupted music and entertainment.
- High-Quality Diaphragm and Wide Compatibility:
Features a high-quality diaphragm for powerful bass and clear treble, delivering an immersive audio experience. Compatible with a wide range of devices including Android, Apple, HarmonyOS, Windows, and gaming consoles. Connects seamlessly to any device with Bluetooth capability.
Package Included:
1 X Speaker, 1 X Charging cable, 1 X User manual
Specifications
Warranty
2-Year Warranty

signal to noise ratio: ≥80dB

Features:
**
360
°Surround Sound
**
Ditoo delivers the powerful 360°sound through its fine-tuned driver and a mind-
blowing
bass radiator. The seamless surround provides an immersive audio experience that covers the whole room and space.
**
DIY Pixel Art Creation
**
Create pixel art designs, animation and display text with a cool background. You can share and interact with other pixel art fans around the world. with Divoom free app. Ditoo will more fun than you thought.
**
Incredible Fun
**
Play Pixel games, remix or record your favorite track with the DJ mixer; everything is possible through the companion APP---Divoom. Ditoo offers many ways for you and your friends to have fun.
**
Advance Smart Alarm
**
Improve your sleep experience with the calibrated lighting and sound. And you can even customize the wake-up ring by your own voice.
**
Helpful Daily Functions
**
Ditoo is capable of many helpful daily functions like Smart alarm, weather report, SNS notification, Online 5000+ radio, daily planner and more…
**
Elegant Craftsmanship
**
Ditoo is not just an eyes candy. We spent countless hours perfecting every product detail, and you can find its fine craftsmanship within.
**
Supported SD Card Music
**
Divoom Ditoo is not only supported wireless audio but also SD card music. You can play the music you want.Ditoo-Pro not only supports bluetooth and SD card, but now supports direct connection to laptop via Type USB-C to play music.
